title: A Shoot Will Spring From Jesse’s Stump

verses.text: The Spirit of the Lord will rest on him to bear good fruit the Spirit of his wisdom and of understanding truth, the Spirit of God’s counsel and the Spirit of his might, the Spirit of true knowledge and of rearing God aright.

The fear of God will fill his heart and mind with great delight. He judges not by ear or sight but justly does the right. With righteousness he rules the poor; the wicked he will slay. The belt of truth and righteousness are ‘round his waist displayed.

A world of everlasting joy and peace, the branch will raise, where wolf shall with the lamb lie down, and cow with bear shall graze. The child shall play by cobra dens and lead wild beasts with ease, for all the earth will know the Lord, as waters fill the seas.
